592:   // Load published pooja products from Supabase and merge with static mock products
593:   const loadPublishedProducts = async () => {
594:     try {
595:       const { data, error } = await supabase
596:         .from('website_pooja_products')
597:         .select('*')
598:         .eq('is_published', true)
599:         .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
600: 
601:       if (error) throw error;
602:       if (data) {
603:         const mappedData: Product[] = data.map((item: any) => ({
604:           id: item.id,
605:           name: item.name,
606:           description: item.description,
607:           price: typeof item.price === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.price) : item.price,
608:           originalPrice: item.original_price ? (typeof item.original_price === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.original_price) : item.original_price) : undefined,
609:           rating: typeof item.rating === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.rating) : (item.rating || 5.0),
610:           reviewsCount: item.reviews_count || 0,
611:           image: item.image || '📿',
612:           category: item.category,
